title: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence
story: I started the program without really knowing what data science or AI meant. I gave up job offers to come here, so I pushed myself to make it count. There was so much to learn, and it was hard — but I don't think I've ever invested so fully in my own growth, and even small wins felt genuinely rewarding. Honestly, I wasn't sure if AI research was the right fit for me. But watching how fast the field is moving now, it's equal parts exciting and terrifying.

title: B.S. in Economics & Computer Science
story: I came in as an economics student. Then I took an intro programming course and something clicked — this is work that actually helps people. And when I found myself pulling all-nighters on code not because I had to, but because I wanted to, I figured this must be the right path. Picked up a computer science double major and didn't look back.
